given: The repository currently lacks a verified native Copilot package schema.
The pack must stay portable and honest about unsupported runtime claims.
must: The manifest must register every shipped rule, workflow, skill, hook, template, doc, and schema file.
The README must stay intentionally plain and modest.
must_not: Claim native hook execution without proof.
Collapse extension logic into the authority pack canon or vice versa.
wiring_claim: The main instructions, manifest registry, and supporting docs point to the same package structure.
